policy: Event-driven only — no cron schedules for PM dispatch. AI agents do not need daily rest.

agent_cycle_complete.description: Specialist agent finished one sprint issue (PR merged or pushed, board updated)

sprint_cycle_complete.description: All issues in active_sprint are done or carry_over resolved; PM may close sprint
sprint_cycle_complete.triggers: PM Agent Automation → open Phase{N}-Sprint{K+1} or phase exit

ci_cycle_complete.description: game/development CI green after agent push/merge (optional secondary trigger)
ci_cycle_complete.triggers: PM Agent Automation (only if cycle_pending marker present)

uat_ready.description: L0–L5 PASS on RC commit; human UAT required
emits: PM after run_cd_gates.sh --channel rc or manual tag
uat_ready.triggers: Human notification Automation (Slack/email) — not another worker

mcp_blocked.triggers: Human notification — fix secrets/snapshot before resume

agent_cycle_failed.description: Worker or CI failed gates — PM must assign remediation on same issue
agent_cycle_failed.triggers: PM Agent Automation — re-dispatch same issue, not next

watchdog_recovery.description: Factory watchdog detected stall, hang, or orchestrator failure — PM must diagnose and re-dispatch
watchdog_recovery.triggers: PM Agent Automation (same webhook as agent_cycle_complete)

factory_halt.description: Human or exhausted recovery attempts — all automatic dispatch stopped

cycle_definition.micro_cycle: One sprint issue: dispatch → session gate → work → PR → board done → agent_cycle_complete event
cycle_definition.sprint_cycle: All issues in sprint_board → sprint_cycle_complete → PM opens next sprint pack
cycle_definition.phase_cycle: phase exit gates PASS → optional RC tag → uat_ready when L5 included

forbidden_triggers: cron schedule for PM dispatch (wastes wall-clock; agents do not sleep)
PM self-trigger without cycle_complete event (orchestrator loop guard)
Worker agent start without run_agent_session_gate.sh PASS
Using factory-watchdog.yml schedule as primary dispatch (watchdog is exception-only)
